mnemonics.title: Characteristics of Decentralized Applications
mnemonics.content: DANCE: Decentralized, Autonomous, Neutral, Community-driven, Evolving

mnemonics.title: Benefits of Decentralized Applications
mnemonics.content: SPACE: Security, Privacy, Autonomy, Community-driven, Evolving

mnemonics.title: Development Process of Decentralized Applications
mnemonics.content: SMART: Smart Contracts, Modular, Autonomous, Reliable, Transparent
